description_long: This is a conical, translucent cup with a smooth, slightly flared rim and a rounded base. The main body is frosted white, allowing some light to pass through but obscuring clear visibility of the interior. On one side, there is a bold, black text and a large red heart graphic, forming the phrase 'I ♥ Coffee', which stands out prominently against the white background. The cup appears to be made of glass or high-quality plastic, with a matte finish that reduces glare. There are no visible handles or lids, and the surface is free from any additional decorative patterns aside from the text and heart. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for both home and café environments.
description: A frosted white, conical cup with 'I ♥ Coffee' text and a red heart graphic, featuring a smooth, matte finish and no handle or lid.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from the back, showing its frosted white surface with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_1: The cup is rotated to reveal the edge of the black text and a hint of the red heart graphic on the side.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full 'I ♥ Coffee' text and red heart graphic clearly on the cup's surface.
description_view_3: The cup is angled to show the side of the red heart and part of the text, with most of the surface remaining frosted white.
